nasb.text: And I will give them one heart, and put a new spirit within them. And I will take the heart of stone out of their flesh and give them a heart of flesh,

esv.text: And I will give them one heart, and a new spirit I will put within them. I will remove the heart of stone from their flesh and give them a heart of flesh,

cnv.text: “我要把一顆心賜給他們，把新的靈放在他們裡面；我要從他們肉體中除掉石心，賜給他們肉心，

ccb.text: 我必赐给他们一颗专一的心，将新灵放在他们里面，除去他们的石心，赐给他们肉心，
